---
title: "Research"
toc: false
sidebar: false
---

::: {.page-intro}
My research is in **high-dimensional statistics** and **machine learning** — change-point
detection, ranking and crowdsourcing problems, and bandits — and I also work on
**high-performance / parallel computing** on GPUs. Click any card below to dive in; some open
**interactive animations** of the work.
:::

## Preprints

::: {.paper-list}

:::: {.paper}
[High-Performance Portable GPU Primitives for Arbitrary Types and Operators in Julia](software/software.qmd#sec-kernelforge){.paper__title}

::: {.paper__meta}
**E. Pilliat** · 2026 · [Preprint]{.aurora-badge .aurora-badge--level}
:::

::: {.paper__links}
[<i class="bi bi-cpu"></i> KernelForge &amp; benchmarks](software/software.qmd#sec-kernelforge) [<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.18695)
:::
::::

:::

## Publications

::: {.paper-list}

:::: {.paper}
[Adaptive Algorithms for Infinitely Many-Armed Bandits: A Unified Framework](research/papers/bandits-many-arms.qmd){.paper__title}

::: {.paper__meta}
**E. Pilliat** · 2026 · [JMLR]{.aurora-badge .aurora-badge--venue}
:::

::: {.paper__links}
[<i class="bi bi-play-circle"></i> interactive](research/papers/bandits-many-arms.qmd) [<i class="bi bi-easel"></i> presentation](research/presentations/bandits_many_arms/presentation.qmd) [<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> arXiv](https://www.arxiv.org/abs/2510.27319)
:::
::::

:::: {.paper}
[Recovering Labels from Crowdsourced Data: An Optimal and Polynomial-Time Method](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v291/pilliat25a.html){.paper__title}

::: {.paper__meta}
**E. Pilliat** · 2025 · [COLT]{.aurora-badge .aurora-badge--venue}
:::

::: {.paper__links}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> paper](https://proceedings.mlr.press/v291/pilliat25a.html) [<i class="bi bi-easel"></i> presentation](research/presentations/crowdsourcing/presentation.qmd)
:::
::::

:::: {.paper}
[On Sparsity and Sub-Gaussianity in the Johnson–Lindenstrauss Lemma](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06275){.paper__title}

::: {.paper__meta}
A. Garivier · **E. Pilliat** · 2024 · [TMLR]{.aurora-badge .aurora-badge--venue}
:::

::: {.paper__links}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2409.06275)
:::
::::

:::: {.paper}
[Optimal rates for ranking a permuted isotonic matrix in polynomial time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.01133){.paper__title}

::: {.paper__meta}
**E. Pilliat** · A. Carpentier · N. Verzelen · 2024 · [SODA]{.aurora-badge .aurora-badge--venue}
:::

::: {.paper__links}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.01133) [<i class="bi bi-easel"></i> presentation](research/pdf/Presentation.pdf)
:::
::::

:::: {.paper}
[Optimal permutation estimation in crowd-sourcing problems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.04092){.paper__title}

::: {.paper__meta}
**E. Pilliat** · A. Carpentier · N. Verzelen · 2023 · [Annals of Statistics]{.aurora-badge .aurora-badge--venue}
:::

::: {.paper__links}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.04092) [<i class="bi bi-easel"></i> presentation](research/pdf/presentation_experts.pdf) [<i class="bi bi-image"></i> poster](research/pdf/poster_experts.pdf)
:::
::::

:::: {.paper}
[Optimal multiple change-point detection for high-dimensional data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2011.07818){.paper__title}

::: {.paper__meta}
**E. Pilliat** · A. Carpentier · N. Verzelen · 2023 · [EJS]{.aurora-badge .aurora-badge--venue}
:::

::: {.paper__links}
[<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-text"></i> arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2011.07818)
:::
::::

:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Make the whole publication card clickable (to its title's destination); inner chip links still work.
(function () {
  document.querySelectorAll('.paper').forEach(function (card) {
    var title = card.querySelector('a.paper__title');
    if (!title) return;
    card.style.cursor = 'pointer';
    card.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      if (e.target.closest('a')) return;
      window.location.href = title.href;
    });
  });
})();
</script>
```
